nextSteps: Important: Before working on the project make sure to read the README.md file in the workspace root directory.
Build for simulator: build_sim({ workspacePath: "<TMPDIR>/ios/SnapshotTestApp.xcworkspace", scheme: "SnapshotTestApp", simulatorName: "iPhone 17" })
Build and run on simulator: build_run_sim({ workspacePath: "<TMPDIR>/ios/SnapshotTestApp.xcworkspace", scheme: "SnapshotTestApp", simulatorName: "iPhone 17" })
